calendarAttributes.title: Appointment attributes
calendarAttributes.subtitle: What attributes would you like to see on the calendar?
calendarAttributes.colorByServiceHelp: Assign colors to each service on the calendar.

classSession.noClassProducts: No classes created. Create a product of type "Class" first.
classSession.cancelConfirmWithAttendees: There are {{count}} attendee(s) registered. They will be notified of the cancellation.

emptyState.title: Waitlist is empty
emptyState.description: No customers are waiting at the moment

promoteDialog.title: Promote from Waitlist
promoteDialog.description: A reservation will be created for this customer

onlineBooking.title: Online booking channels
onlineBooking.subtitle: Share your public booking link or embed the reservation form on your website.
onlineBooking.publicLinkDescription: Share this link with customers on WhatsApp, Instagram, Google Business Profile, or your website's primary booking button. No login required.
onlineBooking.shareStep1Description: In Settings, confirm Online Booking is enabled and your business hours are correct.
onlineBooking.shareStep2Description: Paste it into Instagram, WhatsApp, Google Maps, QR codes, emails, or any button on your site.
onlineBooking.shareStep3Description: If deposits or prepayment are configured and Stripe is active, the customer is sent to Checkout before confirmation.
onlineBooking.directHtmlLink: Direct HTML link for your site
onlineBooking.settingsLink: Online booking is configured in Reservation Settings
onlineBooking.settingsLinkDescription: Enable or disable online booking and configure required fields there.
onlineBooking.customizeDescription: Choose language, theme, and display mode. The code snippet updates live.
onlineBooking.htmlEmbedDescription: Paste this into any HTML page, WordPress theme, or website builder. Works on Wix, Squarespace, Shopify, and custom sites.
onlineBooking.wordpressDescription: Use this shortcode in any page, post, or widget after installing the Avoqado Booking Plugin.
onlineBooking.wordpressPluginNote: Download the Avoqado Booking Plugin from our developer portal to enable shortcode support.
onlineBooking.iframeDescription: For sites that allow iframes but block third-party <script> tags. The widget loads from our CDN inside an isolated frame.
onlineBooking.linkButtonDescription: For ultra-restricted hosts (managed WordPress, GoDaddy Managed, WordPress.com Free) that strip iframes and scripts. The button opens the widget in a new tab.
onlineBooking.linkButtonNote: Use this only if both the HTML snippet and iframe fail to render after publishing.
onlineBooking.whichSnippetDescription: Follow these steps in order — for 9 out of 10 sites, the first one just works.
onlineBooking.flowStep1Title: Start with the regular HTML snippet
onlineBooking.flowStep1Description: Works on custom sites (React, Next.js, HTML), Wix, Squarespace, Shopify and most self-hosted WordPress. If it shows up in production, you're done.
onlineBooking.flowStep2Title: If it doesn't render, try the iframe
onlineBooking.flowStep2Description: If your host blocks third-party <script> tags but allows iframes (some managed WordPress, certain page builders), the iframe embeds the full widget for you.
onlineBooking.flowStep3Title: Still nothing? Use the booking button
onlineBooking.flowStep3Description: Some restrictive hosts (managed WordPress like BUQ/WDesignKit, GoDaddy Managed, WordPress.com Free) strip iframes, scripts and custom elements at save time. The button is a plain <a> link that survives and opens the widget in a new tab.
onlineBooking.npmDescription: For React, Vue, or Angular projects — import as a Web Component.
onlineBooking.previewDescription: This is how your booking page looks to customers. The widget on external sites looks identical.

publicPages.title: Public booking pages
publicPages.subtitle: Share these links with your customers. Each one opens a different booking flow.

brandIdentity.step1Heading: Add your logo and brand color
brandIdentity.step1Description: Your business logo and primary color will appear on your public booking page, receipts, and anywhere else your customers interact with your brand.
brandIdentity.logoFullHelper: A wide version of your logo. Shown as the hero on the booking page.
brandIdentity.logoSmallHelper: A square thumbnail. Used on receipts, avatars, and the widget header.
brandIdentity.colorHelper: A primary color for buttons, badges, and links.
brandIdentity.heroHelper: 16:9, min. 1200px wide. Appears behind the logo on the public page.
brandIdentity.savedDescription: Your changes are now live on book.avoqado.io.
brandIdentity.saveErrorDescription: Please try again in a moment.
brandIdentity.fileUnsupportedDescription: Select a JPG, PNG, WebP, or SVG image.
brandIdentity.uploadErrorDescription: Please try again in a moment.

operatingHours.title: Operating Hours
operatingHours.subtitle: Set your weekly schedule. Closed days will not show availability.

scheduling.slotIntervalHelp: How often time slots are offered
scheduling.maxAdvanceDaysHelp: How far in advance customers can book
scheduling.noShowGraceHelp: Minutes to wait before marking No Show

pacing.maxPerSlotHelp: Concurrent reservations allowed per slot. For 1:1 services (individual appointments), the effective minimum is 1 even if you select 'No limit' — pick the exact number of parallel resources (booths, stations, chairs) if your business takes multiple bookings at once.
pacing.onlineCapacityHelp: Percentage of capacity available for online bookings

welcome.title: 📅 Reservation Settings
welcome.description: I'll walk you through every section. Some options only apply to appointments, others only to classes — look for the "Appointments" and "Classes" badges next to each label.

save.title: Save Changes
save.description: The button stays pinned at the top while you scroll. Enabled only when there's something new to save.

scheduling.title: Scheduling (Appointments)
scheduling.description: Controls how available appointment slots are generated: interval between slots, default duration, max booking lead time, and minimum notice. Classes have their own per-session schedule.

pacing.title: Pacing (Appointments)
pacing.description: Cap how many simultaneous appointments you accept per slot and what percentage of your capacity is exposed online. Class capacity is defined per session.

deposits.title: Deposits
deposits.description: Decide if you require a deposit at booking and how: card hold, fixed amount, percentage of total, or only for large parties. Applies to both types.

payments.title: Payments by type
payments.description: Set the default upfront-payment behavior separately for appointments and classes. Typical pattern: classes require prepayment, appointments pay at the venue. Each service can override its default.

publicBooking.title: Online Booking
publicBooking.description: Enable the public link (book.avoqado.io/your-slug) so customers can book without calling. Decide whether phone or email is required at booking.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.description: Cancellation policy: can customers cancel themselves? Up to how many hours before? Do they lose the deposit on late cancels? Applies to both types.

creditRefund.title: Credit refunds (Classes only)
creditRefund.description: When someone cancels a class paid with a credit pack, decide how many credits return to their balance. Only applies to classes — appointments don't use credit packs.

waitlist.title: Waitlist
waitlist.description: If a class or appointment fills up, customers can join the waitlist and get notified when a spot opens. You set the priority order and how long they have to respond.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.description: Automatic reminders before each booking (email, SMS, or WhatsApp) to reduce no-shows. Channels and timings are configured in backoffice for now.

payments.sectionSubtitle: Set the default upfront-payment behavior per reservation type: pay at venue, prepayment required, or let the customer choose.
payments.appointmentUpfrontDefaultTooltip: Default upfront-payment behavior for appointments: pay at the venue, require prepayment at booking, or optional. Each service can override this.
payments.classUpfrontDefaultTooltip: Default upfront-payment behavior for classes: pay at the venue, require prepayment at booking, or optional. Each class can override this.

deposits.modeTooltip: Defines whether to require a deposit at booking and what type: none, card hold, partial deposit or full prepayment.
deposits.fixedAmountTooltip: Flat amount the customer pays as a deposit when booking.
deposits.percentageTooltip: Percentage of the booking total charged as a deposit.
deposits.partySizeGteHelp: Deposits are only enforced from this party size up. Useful to keep small bookings frictionless.

publicBooking.enabledHelp: Customers can book from your website
publicBooking.requirePhoneTooltip: The customer must enter a phone number when booking online.
publicBooking.requireEmailTooltip: The customer must enter an email address when booking online.

cancellation.allowCustomerCancelTooltip: Whether customers can cancel their bookings from the confirmation link without contacting you.
cancellation.minHoursBeforeHelp: Hours before start to allow cancellation
cancellation.forfeitDepositTooltip: When a customer cancels inside the minimum window, the deposit is not refunded.
cancellation.allowRescheduleHelp: Customer can move their booking to another time slot of the same class, within the cancellation window.
cancellation.creditRefundHelp: Decide how many credits customers recover when they cancel a class paid with a package.
cancellation.creditRefundModeTooltip: When a customer cancels a class paid with a credit pack, decide how many credits are returned to their balance.
cancellation.creditFreeRefundHoursHelp: Cancelling at least N hours before start returns all credits.
cancellation.creditLateRefundHelp: Applies when cancelled within the window above. 0 = forfeit all, 100 = full refund.
cancellation.creditNoShowRefundHelp: If the customer didn't show up, are credits still refunded? (Default: no)

waitlist.enabledTooltip: When a class or service is full, customers can join the waitlist and be notified if a spot opens up.
waitlist.maxSizeTooltip: Maximum number of people who can be on the waitlist for the same class simultaneously.
waitlist.priorityModeTooltip: Order in which the waitlist is notified when a spot opens: first-come, by party size, or broadcast to everyone.
waitlist.notifyWindowHelp: Minutes the customer has to respond

reminders.enabledTooltip: Sends automatic reminders before the booking starts via email, SMS or WhatsApp (depending on active channels).
reminders.channelsTooltip: Channels used to send reminders. You can pick one or several. If all are off, nothing is sent.
reminders.whenToSendTooltip: Lead time for each reminder. You can configure several — e.g. 24h before and 2h before for a stronger nudge.

toasts.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

time.title: Select a time
time.noSlots: No available times for this date

manage.title: Your Reservation
manage.cancelDescription: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation? This action cannot be undone.

cancellationPolicy.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellationPolicy.allowCancel: Free cancellation up to {{hours}} hours before
cancellationPolicy.noCancel: This reservation cannot be cancelled online
cancellationPolicy.depositForfeit: Deposit will be forfeited if cancelled

errors.venueNotFoundDescription: The booking link may be incorrect or the venue is no longer available.
errors.bookingDisabledDescription: This venue is not accepting online reservations at this time.
errors.reservationNotFoundDescription: This booking link may be expired or invalid.
errors.slotTaken: This time slot is no longer available. Please choose another time.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
